title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 455.007 - Mootness doctrine, public interest exception to apply upon expiration of the order
text:
455.007.  Mootness doctrine, public interest exception to apply upon expiration of the order. — Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, the public interest exception to the mootness doctrine shall apply to an appeal of a full order of protection which has expired.
(L. 2011 H.B. 111, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1231)
